title: When He Should Laugh by Edward Thomas — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
WHEN he should laugh the wise man knows full well:
For he knows what is truly laughable.
But wiser is the man who laughs also,
Or holds his laughter, when the foolish do.
meaning: "When He Should Laugh" by Edward Thomas is a deep poem consisting of 4 lines. The poet explores themes of deep through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "WHEN he should laugh the wise man knows full well: For he knows what is truly laughable....", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Edward Thomas's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
